# Create a Scatter Plot

Now we'll use `ggplot2` to create a scatter plot of `x` vs `y`, with a fitted line.

```{r scatter-plot, fig-width=8, fig-height=5}
ggplot(data, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    title = "Scatter Plot with Linear Fit",
    x = "X Variable",
    y = "Y Variable"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Summary Statistics

Let's compute some basic summary statistics.

```{r summary-stats}
data %>%
  summarise(
    mean_x = mean(x),
    mean_y = mean(y),
    sd_y = sd(y),
    cor_xy = cor(x, y)
  )
```
